instructions.tr: Kuzu etini iyice pişirip didikleyin veya blenderdan geçirin.
instructions.en: Cook the lamb meat thoroughly and shred or blend it.
Mix with boiled pumpkin.

description.tr: Basit, temiz ve alerjen içermeyen sebze yemeği.
description.en: Simple, clean and allergen-free vegetable dish.

instructions.tr: Fasulye ve patatesi az suda pişirin.
instructions.en: Cook beans and potatoes in a little water.
Add olive oil and mash.

description.tr: Süt alerjisi olan bebekler için suyla hazırlanan lapa.
description.en: Porridge prepared with water for babies with milk allergy.

instructions.en: Cook the oats with water.
Add grated pear and sweeten.

description.tr: Sadece sebze ve zeytinyağından oluşan saf tarif.
description.en: Pure recipe consisting only of vegetables and olive oil.

instructions.tr: Brokoliyi buharda tam yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
instructions.en: Steam the broccoli until fully soft.

instructions.tr: Ezip üzerine birkaç damla zeytinyağı ekleyin.
instructions.en: Mash and add a few drops of olive oil.
Boil together and mash.

instructions.tr: Et ve kabağı birlikte pişirip püre yapın.
instructions.en: Cook meat and pumpkin together and make a puree.
Boil and mash with olive oil.
Soak in water, remove seeds and mash.
Steam and make a puree.
